testCases.title: Verify login with valid username and valid password
steps: Enter username haklarr in the username field
Enter password Icstunnel1 in the password field
testCases.expectedResult: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application home or dashboard page.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with incorrect username and valid password
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and an error message indicating incorrect username or password is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with valid username and incorrect password
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and an error message indicating incorrect username or password is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when both username and password are incorrect
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and an authentication error message is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username and password are blank
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and a validation or error message indicating missing credentials is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username is blank and password is provided
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and validation error for missing username is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when password is blank and username is provided
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and validation error for missing password is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login page loads successfully
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads successfully with username field, password field, and login button visible.

testCases.title: Verify username and password fields are visible on login page
steps: Observe the form elements on the page
testCases.expectedResult: Username input field and password input field are visible and enabled for user input.

testCases.title: Verify password field masks entered characters
testCases.expectedResult: Password characters are masked or hidden while typing.

testCases.title: Verify username field accepts alphanumeric input
steps: Enter alphanumeric value user123 in username field
testCases.expectedResult: Username field accepts the input without UI errors.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with leading and trailing spaces in username
testCases.expectedResult: System trims spaces or rejects the login with appropriate authentication message.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with leading and trailing spaces in password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails or system handles whitespace according to credential validation rules.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt using very long username
steps: Enter a very long username string exceeding normal length limits
testCases.expectedResult: System rejects the input or shows validation without breaking the UI.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt using very long password
steps: Enter a very long password string
testCases.expectedResult: System rejects authentication or handles long input safely without UI failure.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with special characters in username
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and system handles special characters safely without crashing.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt with special characters in password
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails and authentication error message is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login is case sensitive for username
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails if username is case sensitive.

testCases.title: Verify login is case sensitive for password
testCases.expectedResult: Login fails if password case does not match stored credential.

testCases.title: Verify multiple rapid clicks on Login button during authentication
steps: Click Login button multiple times quickly
testCases.expectedResult: System processes a single login request and prevents duplicate submissions or errors.

testCases.title: Verify login using copy paste for credentials
steps: Copy username haklarr and paste into username field
Copy password Icstunnel1 and paste into password field
testCases.expectedResult: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application dashboard.
